roles.description: The player's destructible base, identified as the blue castle.
roles.note: Directly matches the loss condition referring to the player's (blue) castle.

roles.description: The enemy's destructible base, identified as the red castle.
roles.note: Directly matches the win condition referring to the enemy (red) castle.

roles.description: A selectable unit or weapon from the bottom character selection panel.
roles.note: Represents one of the selectable units (e.g., Red Alien, Skeleton, or Goblin).

roles.description: Another selectable unit or weapon from the bottom character selection panel.
A unique projectile launched by a unit (e.g., Missile or Tombstone).
A second unique projectile launched by a unit.
The background music track for the game.
Sound effect for dragging, releasing, or projectile impact.
